inline_comments.message:
I think the policy models shouldn't be loaded every time when health check is called. The models are supposed to be uploaded only when a new model is added or updated in case of changes to any existing model. 
Policies are also required to be recreated/updated with latest model version when there is any model change.

Also, the health check can be performed by other applications or clients/users. We should restrict them to update OSDF models unknowingly.

I would suggest to add another endpoint to upload models and call whenever it is required (may be as a part of the OSDF deployment)
The path is hard-coded to load only placement models. We may need to make it generic to support for other optimizations without requiring code changes in future.
Sure. I can add one more parameter for the path inside the osdf config.
